scripts.cap:sync: npx cap sync android && node scripts/patch-android.cjs
scripts.cap:build: npm run build && npx cap copy android && node scripts/patch-android.cjs && node scripts/gradlew.cjs assembleDebug
scripts.cap:build:release: npm run build && npx cap copy android && node scripts/patch-android.cjs && node scripts/gradlew.cjs assembleRelease
